name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: ACE Cash Express Grand Prairie, Texas — ACE Cash Express offers check cashing, money transfers, bill payments, and financial services at physical store ...
description_long: ACE Cash Express operates a network of physical store locations providing financial services to consumers who need quick access to cash and payment solutions. The company has been serving customers through brick-and-mortar locations, with a significant presence across multiple states including Colorado, California, and Louisiana. Their service portfolio spans multiple financial needs beyond traditional payday lending, positioning them as a broader financial services provider for underbanked consumers. However, the website indicates limited online loan availability and state-specific restrictions on certain products, suggesting variable service offerings by location and jurisdiction.
address: 410 E Pioneer Pkwy Ste 200, Grand Prairie, TX 75051

company_info.headquarters: 410 E Pioneer Pkwy Ste 200, Grand Prairie, TX 75051

pros: Multiple service offerings beyond loans: check cashing, bill payments, money transfers, and tax services
Physical store network for in-person transactions and immediate service
Installment loan and title loan options available in eligible states
Business services available for commercial customers
Customer service support via phone and email with dedicated online operations team
Transparent privacy practices with California Notice at Collection publicly accessible
Multiple contact channels for general inquiries and online loan questions
cons: Website shows 404 errors on location pages, indicating poor site maintenance and potentially outdated information
Service availability varies significantly by state and location, with some loan types unavailable in certain jurisdictions
No transparent pricing, fees, or APR information displayed on available website content
Physical store dependence may be inconvenient for customers in areas without nearby locations
Limited online loan accessibility compared to direct digital competitors
best_for: Consumers needing immediate check cashing services without a bank account
Customers in states where ACE has physical locations and can access title or installment loans
People requiring bill payment or money transfer services at a physical location
Small business owners seeking business financial services
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best for unbanked or underbanked consumers with physical access to store locations who need check cashing, bill payment, or money transfer services. The primary caveat is significant state-by-state variation in available products and unreliable website information, requiring direct contact or store visit to confirm service eligibility.
